recipe.title: French Toast Casserole
steps: Cube the French bread and place in a greased 9x13 baking dish.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon until well combined.
Pour the egg mixture over the bread cubes, ensuring all pieces are coated. Press down gently.
Dot the top with butter. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Remove cover and bake for 45 minutes until golden and set.
Let rest 5 minutes before serving. Serve with maple syrup.
